creator: olgeni@uli.it
text:
Typo in /usr/src/release/texts/i386/RELNOTES.TXT: compatability -> compatibility,
same for alpha/RELNOTES.TXT

Fix: Patch /usr/src/release/texts/i386/RELNOTES.TXT.
Apply corresponding fix to alpha release notes.



The compiler chain now uses the FSF-supplied C/C++ runtime
! initialization code.  This change brings about better compatability
  with code generated from the various egcs and gcc ports, as well as
  the stock public FSF source.

--- 227,233 ----
  connections in sshd has been added.

  The compiler chain now uses the FSF-supplied C/C++ runtime
! initialization code.  This change brings about better compatibility
  with code generated from the various egcs and gcc ports, as well as
  the stock public FSF source.--4nqYBiQpAcexV1Z21eHv3aY8W3MseNpo2mxJDVmRs3XOtYHq
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

*** RELNOTES.TXT.orig   Tue Nov 14 15:55:40 2000
--- RELNOTES.TXT        Tue Nov 14 15:55:52 2000
***************
*** 227,233 ****
  connections in sshd has been added.
